2025.personalBaseIncomeNote: Management fee (T4A) — pre-tax personal income used as baseline

bankAccounts.name: Simplii Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Minimum held balance during hawl year. Check monthly statements for lowest point.

bankAccounts.name: TD Joint Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Joint account — include your portion (or full amount if all zakatable to you).

bankAccounts.name: PayPal
bankAccounts.notes: USD balance — converted to CAD at the rate above.

bankAccounts.name: Cash on Hand
bankAccounts.notes: Estimated physical cash held at home.

bankAccounts.name: TD Corp Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Corporate bank account. Your zakatable portion = balance after setting aside estimated corp tax.

bankAccounts.name: Nano Corp Chequing
bankAccounts.notes: Second corporate account. Enter 0 if inactive.

corpIncomeAdjustments.name: Main Corp (Ontario CCPC)
corpIncomeAdjustments.notes: Revenue $181,120 - expenses $77,374 - corp tax $36,152 = ~$67,594 net. This is the after-tax amount that would flow to you. Use 'Import from Tax App' to auto-populate from Corp Tax Manager.

corpIncomeAdjustments.name: Nano Corp
corpIncomeAdjustments.notes: Second corporation. Enter gross income, expenses, and estimated tax. App calculates net × your share %.

investments.notes: Corporate investment account — CAD holdings. Debt ratio 0% for cash/GICs. For stocks or ETFs, enter the company/fund debt ratio to purify.
Corporate investment — USD holdings. Converted to CAD using the rate in settings (e.g. $50,000 USD × 1.40 = $70,000 CAD).
Scholars differ on RRSP: (1) pay on full value yearly (conservative), (2) pay only on withdrawal, (3) pay on estimated after-tax value. This uses option 1.
TFSA — most scholars say zakatable since you have full access. No tax on withdrawal.
Non-registered investment. Debt ratio 25% means 75% of market value is zakatable. Check fund's annual report for actual debt-to-asset ratio.
Index fund — broad market ETFs typically have ~25-35% debt ratio across holdings. Only 70% of value is zakatable.

preciousMetals.notes: 18K gold = 75% purity. Weigh all gold items and enter total. App calculates: 50g × 0.75 = 37.5g pure × $120/g = $4,500.
24K = 100% purity. Investment-grade gold bullion. App calculates: 10g × 1.0 = 10g pure × $120/g = $1,200.
Sterling silver = 92.5% purity. App calculates: 200g × 0.925 = 185g pure × $1.40/g = $259.

receivables.notes: Lent $2,000 — expects full repayment. 'Certain' means included in zakatable total.
Billed but not yet received. 'Likely' = still included. Change to 'Doubtful' if collection is uncertain.
Unlikely to be collected — 'Doubtful' means excluded from zakatable total.

liabilities.notes: Combined outstanding CC balance at hawl date. This is deducted from zakatable wealth.
Utility bills, phone bills, etc. due within the month.
Only deduct upcoming 12 months of payments ($2,000/mo × 12), NOT total mortgage balance. Some scholars say no mortgage deduction at all.
Next 12 months of car payments ($500/mo × 12). Same principle as mortgage — only short-term portion.

recipients.name: Islamic Relief Canada
recipients.notes: Accepts Visa/MC/Amex online. Tax receipt issued immediately. CRA charity #: 821896875RR0001

recipients.name: Human Concern International
recipients.notes: Ottawa-based. Accepts online donations. Tax receipt issued.

recipients.name: National Zakat Foundation Canada
recipients.notes: Distributes zakat locally within Canada to eligible recipients. Tax receipt issued.

recipients.name: Local Masjid Zakat Fund
recipients.notes: E-transfer to zakat@masjid.com — confirm with treasurer that funds go to zakat-eligible recipients only

recipients.name: LaunchGood Campaigns
recipients.notes: Crowdfunding platform — filter by 'Zakat-eligible' campaigns. Verify each campaign's zakat eligibility.

recipients.name: Family Member (Eligible)
recipients.notes: Must qualify as one of the 8 categories (poor, needy, in debt, etc.). Cannot give to parents, children, or spouse.

recipients.name: Penny Appeal Canada
recipients.notes: Accepts online. Focuses on orphan care, water, food security. Tax receipt issued.

zakatPayments.notes: Zakat to eligible family member in need.
